infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ConsentVault needs camera access to capture photos as part of consent record documentation.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ConsentVault needs microphone access to record audio consent sessions.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: ConsentVault uses Face ID to protect your sensitive consent records from unauthorized access

plugins.faceIDPermission: ConsentVault uses Face ID to protect your sensitive consent records from unauthorized access.

extra.description: Secure consent and agreement management. Create, sign, and store digital consent records, contracts, NDAs, waivers, and GDPR compliance documents with tamper-proof SHA-256 verification.
extra.appReviewNotes: Consent record management app with encryption, biometric lock, and SHA-256 integrity verification. Users create, sign, and export consent documents as verified PDFs. This is a record management tool, not a legal services app. Stripe Payment Links handles subscriptions.
